fields.description:
## Goal
Graduate `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py` (currently 1093 LOC, the single LARGEST module-size offender) off the module-size gate by extracting a cohesive cluster of 10 pure/IO leaf UTILITY symbols into a NEW sibling leaf module `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_helpers.py`.

## Seam (on the code's CURRENT structure)
The 10 moved symbols are the pass's leaf support utilities — NONE take `_PassContext`; they are pure/IO helpers the staying `_PassContext`-driven phase helpers call: `StatusMappingError`, `preflight_status_mapping`, `_commit_binding_store_snapshot`, `_audit_log_probe`, `route_inbound_probe`, `_read_local_tickets`, `_build_filter_target_set`, `_mutation_matches_filter`, `_build_plan_entries`, `_NoOpSyncLogger` (~412 LOC of bodies). The leaf reproduces the `lazy_load`+`_load` bootstrap boilerplate (same pattern as sibling `run_differs.py`) so it lazy-loads ITS OWN siblings (config.py, alert_store.py, mutation.py, inbound_probe.py, git_adapter). The leaf imports NOTHING from reconcile.py (true leaf, no back-edge). reconcile.py loads the leaf immediately AFTER the `_load` helper is defined (post lazy_load bootstrap, ~current line 266) via `_helpers = _load('reconcile_helpers', 'reconcile_helpers.py')`, then binds each of the 10 names as a module-level re-export.

## Stale-comment updates in scope (BOTH files)
Two now-stale in-tree assertions about route_inbound_probe's residency are updated as part of this change:
1. reconcile.py comment near current line 586 (contains 'route_inbound_probe stays here because it is a separately-tested public surface') -> replaced with prose stating route_inbound_probe now lives in the reconcile_helpers.py leaf and is re-exported here (reconcile_once still passes the re-exported bare name into run_differs).
2. run_differs.py module docstring (current lines ~15-17), which contains 'which reconcile.py keeps because it is a separately-tested public surface' -> replaced with prose saying route_inbound_probe now lives in reconcile_helpers.py and is re-exported FROM reconcile.py. The parameter-passing design (run_differs holds no back-edge; the router is passed in, not imported) is UNCHANGED — only the residency clause is corrected.

## DEVIATION from docs/architecture.md remedy row (stated plainly)
The arch.md offenders-table row for reconcile.py proposes a `reconcile_passes.py` seam extracting the `_PassContext`-driven pass-phase helpers (`_load_snapshots`/`_handle_corrupt_snapshot`/`_apply_mutations`/`_persist_and_log`). That row is SUPERSEDED: that seam would need THREE modules to avoid a back-edge, because those phase helpers depend on the leaf utilities extracted here — so the phase helpers cannot move cleanly without dragging the utilities along or importing back into reconcile.py. Leaf-utility extraction is the cleaner single split. This ticket DELETES the stale reconcile.py remedy row from docs/architecture.md.

## Nature of change
A pure/mechanical refactor (move + re-export; the only prose edits are the two stale-comment corrections above; no signature or logic changes). E5 testing-plan is not-applicable — the existing reconciler unit tests are the oracle (many load reconcile.py by-path and access these symbols as `reconcile.<symbol>` attributes, which the re-exports preserve).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New leaf `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_helpers.py` exists and is in [100,800] LOC. Verified by: `n=$(wc -l < src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_helpers.py); [ "$n" -ge 100 ] && [ "$n" -le 800 ]` exits 0 (expected ~497).
- [ ] `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py` is <=800 LOC. Verified by: `[ "$(wc -l < src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py)" -le 800 ]` exits 0 (expected ~685).
- [ ] reconcile.py removed from the module-size gate files and its remedy row deleted from docs. Verified by: `grep -c 'reconcile.py' .github/module-size-allowlist.txt` returns 0, `grep -c 'rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py ' .github/module-size-ceilings.txt` returns 0, and `grep -c 'rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py' docs/architecture.md` returns 0.
- [ ] reconcile_helpers.py is NOT added to either gate file. Verified by: `grep -c reconcile_helpers .github/module-size-allowlist.txt .github/module-size-ceilings.txt` returns 0 for both.
- [ ] The two stale route_inbound_probe residency comments are replaced in BOTH files. Verified by: `grep -c 'route_inbound_probe stays here' src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py` returns 0 AND `grep -c 'reconcile.py keeps' src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/run_differs.py` returns 0.
- [ ] The module-size contract test passes. Verified by: `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py -q` exits 0.
- [ ] All 10 symbols remain resolvable as `reconcile.<symbol>` via re-export and the reconciler unit suite is green. Verified by: `python -m pytest tests/unit/rebar_reconciler -q` exits 0.
- [ ] Lint is clean. Verified by: `make lint` prints 'All checks passed!' and exits 0.
